Cree journalist Connie Walker has spent years reporting on cases of missing and murdered Indigenous women and girls, riveting listeners and earning accolades for her projects. After spending the bulk of her career in public broadcasting in Canada, she launched a Spotify podcast, Stolen, in 2018. ﻿It will return this winter for season three. - THE CUT
